hero.art_prompt: Divya, a 28 year old Indian woman in business-casual, warm and confident, leading a friendly team discussion, modern office, approachable and aspirational.

panels.narration: Divya was already good at handling people at work.
panels.dialogue: People always came to me for help.
panels.img_prompt: Divya, 28, warmly helping colleagues at work, natural people person, modern office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I lead HR for real?
panels.img_prompt: Divya looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from helping people to leading HR, laptop open, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then she found an online MBA in Human Resource Management.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Divya's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Human Resource Management, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Divya enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Divya confidently starting her first HR management lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Human Resource Management
points: Master the real craft: talent acquisition, performance management, HR analytics and labour law.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.

testimonials.name: Divya Iyer
testimonials.quote: I always loved supporting people. This MBA turned that into a real HR leadership path.

testimonials.name: Kavya Menon
testimonials.quote: Learning HR analytics and modern tools made me far more than a coordinator.

testimonials.quote: The 0% EMI and weekend classes let me grow into HR without leaving work.
